-F'/Volumes/D/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk/System/Cryptexes/OS/System/Library/Frameworks' -mios-version-min=16.0 -funwind-tables -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Volumes/D/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first
